title: Account
displayNameHint: Defaults to your sign-in email. Set a friendlier public name (min 5 chars, unique, case-insensitive).
displayNameTaken: That display name is already taken. Try another.
photoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP — max 1.5 MB.
loadError: We could not load your profile.
missingProfile: Complete onboarding first to edit your training profile.
avatarTypeError: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
avatarUploadError: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
deleteAccountDescription: Permanently deletes your account and all your data (programs, sessions, profile). This cannot be undone.
deleteAccountDialogDescription: All your programs, sessions, and profile will be permanently erased. You will be signed out immediately. This action cannot be reversed.
deleteAccountError: Could not delete your account. Try again or contact admin@gymlogic.me.
